About the Name Linda

The name Linda is estimated to be held by approximately 1,452,428 people worldwide, making it rank #8 in global name popularity. This female name has Germanic origins, and its meaning is associated with "Beautiful, soft."

Based on our analysis of birth registration data, census records, and demographic modeling across more than 80 countries, Linda has maintained a consistently strong presence in naming records.

Historical Popularity of Linda

The popularity of Linda has shifted considerably over time. Below is a decade-by-decade breakdown of the name's relative popularity.

Regional Distribution of Linda

The name Linda is used across multiple countries and regions.

United States1,100,000 (76%)
United Kingdom150,000 (10%)
Canada95,000 (7%)
Australia60,000 (4%)

Gender Distribution

Linda is predominantly used as a female name.

Cultural Background and Origin

The name Linda has its roots in Germanic linguistic and cultural traditions. The meaning "Beautiful, soft" reflects the values and aspirations that were important to the culture from which the name originated.

Ad Slot

Similar Names to Linda

If you're interested in Linda, you might also want to explore these related names:

LailaLanceLaneLarryLauraLaurenLawrenceLaylaLeahLeland

Interesting Facts About Linda

If there are 1,452,428 people named Linda worldwide, that means approximately 1 in every 5,508 people on Earth shares this name.
